title: AWS DevOps Agent Added Custom SRE Agents And MCP/A2A Protocol Support
summary: AWS announced AWS DevOps Agent expansion with custom SRE agents plus MCP and A2A protocol support, adding new agent-integration surfaces for teams using AWS-managed operational agents.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official source reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review custom SRE agent permissions, MCP/A2A boundaries, and runbook ownership before enabling in production operations.
Treat new MCP/A2A integrations as untrusted tool surfaces and validate least-privilege policies before connecting agent hosts.

detail.change_summary: AWS DevOps Agent gained custom SRE agent support and MCP/A2A protocol integration paths for operational agent workflows.

limitations: The source-review candidate classified this as model availability; source-owner review corrected it to an agent workflow/protocol surface change.
